default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off engagement with SentinelOne, understand current state and priorities for content/SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne prioritizing pipeline generation and AI/LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Opportunity to create vulnerability database subdirectory site](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Need to connect with multiple stakeholders (PR, demand gen, product teams)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Rebrand/website redesign in progress (\~3+ months out)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)

## Topics

### Current Website and Content Status

  - [WordPress site with \~613 Cybersecurity 101 pages and \~800 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Major content push started Oct 2022 for Cybersecurity 101 section](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2371.0)
  - [Product pages need refresh to align with new go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Blog now owned by PR team, focusing on quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2440.0)
  - [Separate SEO agency working on Cybersecurity 101 content](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2513.0)

### Key Business Priorities

  - [Driving pipeline generation through website](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Optimizing for visibility in AI/LLM search results](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Moving from promotional tool to main business driver](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Balancing innovation (e.g. AI) with security considerations](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Target Audience and Differentiation

  - [Dual focus: CISOs and Security Practitioners](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [CISOs: Efficiency, CFO concerns, IT impact](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Practitioners: Product details, multiple levels of depth](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Key differentiators: Protection layer, AI innovation, ease of partnership](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Lead Generation and Tracking

  - [High-value forms (demos, product tours, chat) are direct MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Other assets contribute to scoring model in Marketo](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Recently relaunched resources page, gathering initial performance data](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Working on improving website funnel tracking and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)

### Vulnerability Database Project

  - [High-priority project to create AI-generated vulnerability database](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Similar to recent launch by competitor (Wiz)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2755.0)
  - [Opportunity for GrowthX to own end-to-end development](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2781.0)
  - [Preference for subdirectory implementation, separate from main CMS](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

### Ongoing Website Initiatives

  - [Full website redesign/rebrand in progress (\~3+ months timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
  - [New information architecture and solution areas being developed](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)
  - [Moving from WordPress to headless CMS (Content Stack)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Connect with Drew/Joshua for brand guidelines and rebrand details](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Get intro to PR team lead for blog collaboration discussion](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3552.0)
  - [Connect with Allie Kramer from Demand Gen team](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3505.0)
  - [Obtain access to keyword lists and research documentation](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3705.0)
  - [Schedule deep dives with product/technical experts](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3633.0)
  - [Develop proposal for vulnerability database subdirectory site](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to augment existing SEO efforts (Cybersecurity 101, product pages)](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for direct communication with relevant stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/7_zMWuaxY9ZQxz8pPvoWTVNfKqaFSUwq?tab=summary&timestamp=3652.0)
